on

Rasheedat Ajibade has expressed disappointment with the Super Falcons early ouster from the 2024 Olympic Games.

The Super Falcons exited the women’s football event following a 3-1 defeat to Japan on Wednesday.

Randy Waldrum’s side lost all three group games, scoring one goal and conceding five.

Ajibade however appreciate the fans for their support despite the team’s poor showing.

“It was a disappointing outcome in the end for the team after three tough tests against some of the best football teams in the world,” the Atletico Madrid winger wrote on X.

“We thank you for your endless love and support. We appreciate every one of you. In all, we give thanks to God.”
